title: More Modded GUI Revision Dark
description: A large modded compatibility pack in the style of GUI Revision Dark
body:
**Note: Not abandoned, simply a lot of IRL and actual work on it. 50+ mods will be added with a refresh of some older GUIs like the FD menus, which are not to my liking in 1.1; 1.5 will be the version and will include many Fabric and Forge mods. This will happen in a few months most likely, or later -- to reiterate, a LOT of IRL going on -- thanks <3**

## Credits:

This project utilizes [Vixel's](https://modrinth.com/user/Vixel) [GUI Revision](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-revision) and assets namely from [Emploice's](https://modrinth.com/user/Emploice) [GUI Revision Dark](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-revision-dark) theme, which is required for More-Modded GUI Revision Dark to function.

The font used in [GUI Revision Dark](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-revision-dark) Dark is [qrafty's](https://www.curseforge.com/members/qrxtfly/projects) [Capitalized Font](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/qraftys-capitalized-font).

Aside from direct support for some 35 mods' GUIs this pack overwrites some aspects of [GUI Revision Dark](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-revision-dark) with my own flavor of style, fixes for various inconsistencies, or QOL patches like button highlights and element locations.

You may use this in your modpack with credit to me, so long as GUI Revision Dark allows use.

## FAQ:

Q: Make it for X version!

A: Chances are it already works minus new GUIs. I am not responsible for vanilla versions above 1.20.1. I will update mod GUIs for versions I personally use. This takes a lot of time and is namely a personal project.

Q: Can this be used standalone?

A: NO, this pack requires [GUI Revision Dark](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-revision-dark) to function properly. 

Q: Can you do support for X mod?

A: If I know the mod and have played with it in the past and liked it then chances are YES, I'd love to add more!

Q: Why isn't X mod supported?

A: I don't like it, I haven't heard of it, or I've never played with it

Q: Will you make a [GUI Revision](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-revision) (light mode) version?

A: [Fyoncle](https://modrinth.com/user/Fyoncle) already has one called [GUI Revision Compats](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-revision-compats). Check Planned Support below for my ordered priorities.

Q: Why did you make this pack?

A: I am making a modpack, and I felt that with the level of effort I am spending, I should make my GUI experience nicer. GUI Revision is the cleanest, most artistically vanilla GUI I found, and Dark really improved some aspects.

- [Trade Cycling](https://modrinth.com/mod/trade-cycling)
- [HT's Tree Chop](https://modrinth.com/mod/treechop)

I would like to support other mods, but I either don't use them or they have issues, or they just haven't been done yet. If your mod isn't in the following list, [comment](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/more-modded-gui-revision-dark/comments) to let me know. I may find time to add it in. Chances are that if [GUI Revision Dark](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gui-revision-dark) supports a mod already I will not add it to this list. Make sure to check whether a mod is supported on either page before asking in either. Especially the Create centric mods below may be packaged into a separate upload. I will link to them here if and when they are uploaded.

## Planned Support:

- Accessories (in progress)
- Tempad
- Stitched Sins (Bad GUI math, can be fixed via Polytone)
- Easy Shulker Boxes (color code not supported below 1.21+)
